services.title: Pilates for Rehabilitation
services.desc: Designed for individuals with musculoskeletal conditions or postural imbalances such as neck pain, lower back pain, scoliosis, herniated discs, spinal stenosis, knee pain, and plantar fasciitis.

services.title: Prenatal & Postnatal
services.desc: Supports mothers during and after pregnancy by strengthening muscles, improving flexibility, and restoring pelvic floor and core stability.

services.title: Athletes
services.desc: Enhances performance through targeted muscle activation and sport-specific functional training while supporting injury recovery.

services.title: Elderly
services.desc: Improves strength, flexibility, and balance for safer movement and a better quality of life.

packages.title: Trial Session
packages.desc: Experience Pilates one-on-one at a special rate while assessing posture and personal goals.

packages.title: Private Package
packages.desc: Personalized training designed specifically for your body and goals.

packages.title: Family Package
packages.desc: Train with friends or loved ones with customized programs for each participant.

about.vision: Revive Your Body • Refresh Your Mind • Rediscover Your Strength
about.desc: We are a private Pilates studio with five dedicated rooms designed for focused, safe, and comfortable training. All instructors are licensed Physical Therapists who provide personalized programs based on posture analysis, movement assessment, and rehabilitation principles.

contact.address: 2nd Floor, Cove Hill Project, 1888 Charoen Krung Road, Bangkok 10120
